name: Reese's Peanut Butter Cup Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: Cream cheese, 32 oz (softened for 2 mins in microwave)
Reese's peanut butter cups, 8 (chopped into medium pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix and pat Graham crackers, melted butter, and sugar into a 10-inch springform pan to form the crust.
2. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese until light. Add sugar and continue beating.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition. Stir in cornstarch, vanilla, and whipping cream.
4. Stir in chopped Reese's peanut butter cups.
5. Pour batter into the prepared crust.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour, or until the outer edge is firm but the center remains soft.
7. Keep a pan of water in the bottom of the oven during baking.
8. When done, run a knife around the edge of the cheesecake.
9. Allow to cool completely before topping with additional chopped Reese's peanut butter cups and drizzling with melted chocolate.
10. Optional: Add 1 cup chopped peanuts to the crust or 1/2 cup peanut butter to the cake batter (after eggs and before cream).
